title: Define Wave 28 manager auth/session UX hardening contract
description: Extend architecture docs with the manager login/session UX hardening contract: blank login-first entry, success and failure auth envelope expectations, restore/refresh decision tree, and unauthorized or session-expired recovery states.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture defines manager login-first entry without implicit credential bootstrap defaults
Contract defines success metadata and failure envelope expectations for login, refresh, and me flows
UX map includes login idle, validation error, invalid credentials, restoring session, unauthorized, session-expired, and dashboard transitions
